art_market.summary: Several major exhibitions conclude today, March 22, 2026, marking a transition point in Seoul's exhibition calendar.
closing_today: Artist Research: Unfinished Flora & Time Blooms (Buk-Seoul Museum of Art)
Klimt and Ricci Oddi Miracle (The My Art Museum)
ongoing: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center (until June 28)
Kim Yun Shin: Two Be One at Hoam Museum of Art (until June 28)
Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul (Ongoing)
Park Chan-kyong: Zen Master Eyeball at Kukje Gallery (until May 10)

stock_market.summary: The KOSPI market closed at 5,781.20 on Friday, March 20, 2026. Markets are currently closed for the weekend. The Financial Services Commission (FSC) announced plans to split the Kosdaq into two tiers to enhance efficiency.

key_indicators.Market_Sentiment: High volatility, concerns of bubble formation post-year-long rally.
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Retail investor dominance vs. foreign offloading, geopolitical tensions, and potential Kosdaq restructuring.
key_indicators.Outlook: Analysts advise caution due to ongoing high volatility and geopolitical risks.
